case_context.learning_objective: What an entrepreneur should learn from this case.
case_context.first_principle: The one reason this case is worth studying.
case_context.evidence_boundary: Do not write unsupported founder cash, margin, burn, CAC, losses, or ROI.

capital_history.event_type: first_order / crowdfunding / funding / revenue / loss / acquisition
capital_history.description: What happened and why it matters.

core_product_cases.name: Core product line
core_product_cases.case_role: verified core product line / market expansion / strategic experiment
core_product_cases.original_pain: The customer pain and market gap.
core_product_cases.why_incumbents_failed: Why existing players left the opportunity open.

development_costs.label: Known cost signal
development_costs.value: Use funding, campaign spend, supply commitment, team scale, or explicitly say not calculable.

subscription_software.label: Subscription/software boundary
subscription_software.value: Paid plan or sourced no-subscription boundary.

competitor_prices.label: Competitor
competitor_prices.value: Sourced competitor price or total-cost comparison.

return_evidence.label: Return signal
return_evidence.value: Crowdfunding, revenue, units, profit, acquisition, valuation.

roi_assessment.formula: ROI = (gross profit - all development / launch / support costs) / all costs
roi_assessment.conclusion: State what can and cannot be concluded.

recruitment_signals.signal: Role family or captured job post title
recruitment_signals.capability_gap: What capability this hire would add.
recruitment_signals.validation_needed: What to verify before treating this as fact.

official_site_signals.signal: New product, technology keyword, channel, service, pricing, country, or investor page change

future_bets.why_it_matters: Why this matters to the company.
future_bets.watch_next: What would confirm or disconfirm it.
